metadata.title: ShipFirst
metadata.description: Where vibe coders get their first paying customer. Free to list · 15% when you sell.

home.tagline: Where vibe coders get their first paying customer
home.headline: You shipped it. Nobody paid.
home.body: Free to list. 15% only when you sell. Fair Deal badges show cancel & refund terms upfront.
home.supabaseHint: Connect Supabase to show listed products here.

login.title: Log in
login.setupBody: Supabase is not configured. Copy .env.example to .env.local, add your URL and anon key, then restart the dev server.
login.errorCallback: We couldn't complete the auth link. Please try again.
login.cardDesc: Manage your products as a maker
login.signupConfirm: We sent a confirmation email. Open the link to continue. (For local dev, turn off email confirmation in Supabase.)

maker.title: Maker dashboard
maker.stripeBannerBody: Buyers can't pay until Stripe Connect is linked. You can still list and publish products now.
maker.dashboardHint: Manage drafts, published products, and payouts from here.
maker.productsEmpty: No products yet. Create your first listing — drafts are fine.
maker.newHint: You can save a draft. Publishing shows your product on the homepage.

account.title: My purchases
account.subtitle: Products you've bought on ShipFirst.
account.week2Hint: Checkout goes live in Week 2. Your purchase history will appear here after you buy.
account.empty: No purchases yet. Browse products and check back after Week 2 checkout launches.

purchaseComplete.title: Purchase complete
purchaseComplete.headline: Thank you for your purchase
purchaseComplete.body: This is a placeholder screen for the post-checkout flow.
purchaseComplete.week2Note: Stripe Checkout and order details will be wired in Week 2.

badges.fairDealTip: Price, cancel URL, and refund policy are shown before purchase

form.errorFairDeal: Can't publish until Fair Deal requirements are met
form.name: Product name *
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What it does, who it's for, why it's worth paying for (80+ chars to publish)
form.trialTermsPlaceholder: When billing starts after trial (50+ chars)
form.fairDealHint: To earn the Fair Deal badge when publishing, cancel URL, refund policy, and price must be clear.
form.fairDealPreviewOk: Ready for Fair Deal when you publish
form.fairDealPreviewFail: Fix these before publishing for Fair Deal
form.fairDealPreviewHint: Live check — updates as you type.
form.refundSupplement: Extra terms (optional · 30+ chars recommended for Fair Deal)
form.subAck: I state that users can cancel their subscription at any time *

1.label: 14-day full refund (any reason)
1.body:
If you request a refund within 14 days of purchase, we will refund the full amount for any reason.
Contact support from the email used at checkout.

2.label: 7-day refund if unused
2.body:
Refunds within 7 days are available only if you have not materially used the service.
If significant usage is detected, a refund may be denied.

3.label: No refunds (digital delivery)
3.body:
Due to the nature of digital goods, we generally do not offer refunds after purchase.
Please review features, pricing, and billing terms before buying.

fairDeal.nameShort: Product name must be at least 3 characters
fairDeal.descriptionShort: Description must be at least 80 characters
fairDeal.cancelUrlHttps: Cancel URL must start with https://
fairDeal.refundPolicy: Refund policy needs 100+ chars, or template + 30+ chars extra
fairDeal.subAck: Subscription listings require the cancel-anytime acknowledgment
fairDeal.trialTerms: Trial terms must be at least 50 characters
fairDeal.notPublished: Only published products can earn Fair Deal

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 3 characters
validation.descriptionMin: Description must be at least 80 characters
validation.trialTermsMin: Trial terms must be at least 50 characters
validation.refundCustomMin: Custom refund policy must be at least 100 characters
validation.supplementMin: If you add extra terms, use at least 30 characters
